# Lamentations 3

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

## Verses (66)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | I am the man who has seen trouble by the rod of his wrath. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | By him I have been made to go in the dark where there is no light. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Truly against me his hand has been turned again and again all the day. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | My flesh and my skin have been used up by him and my bones broken. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | He has put up a wall against me, shutting me in with bitter sorrow. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | He has kept me in dark places, like those who have been long dead. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | He has put a wall round me, so that I am not able to go out; he has made great the weight of my chain. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Even when I send up a cry for help, he keeps my prayer shut out. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | He has put up a wall of cut stones about my ways, he has made my roads twisted. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | He is like a bear waiting for me, like a lion in secret places. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | By him my ways have been turned on one side and I have been pulled in bits; he has made me waste. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | With his bow bent, he has made me the mark for his arrows. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | He has let loose his arrows into the inmost parts of my body. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | I have become the sport of all the peoples; I am their song all the day. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | He has made my life nothing but pain, he has given me the bitter root in full measure. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | By him my teeth have been broken with crushed stones, and I am bent low in the dust. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | My soul is sent far away from peace, I have no more memory of good. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | And I said, My strength is cut off, and my hope from the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Keep in mind my trouble and my wandering, the bitter root and the poison. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | My soul still keeps the memory of them; and is bent down in me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | This I keep in mind, and because of this I have hope. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | It is through the Lord's love that we have not come to destruction, because his mercies have no limit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | They are new every morning; great is your good faith. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | I said to myself, The Lord is my heritage; and because of this I will have hope in him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | The Lord is good to those who are waiting for him, to the soul which is looking for him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | It is good to go on hoping and quietly waiting for the salvation of the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | It is good for a man to undergo the yoke when he is young. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | Let him be seated by himself, saying nothing, because he has put it on him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | Let him put his mouth in the dust, if by chance there may be hope. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | Let his face be turned to him who gives him blows; let him be full of shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | For the Lord does not give a man up for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | For though he sends grief, still he will have pity in the full measure of his love. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | For he has no pleasure in troubling and causing grief to the children of men. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | In a man's crushing under his feet all the prisoners of the earth, | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | In his turning away the right of a man before the face of the Most High. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
| [36](BBE.md#v36) | In his doing wrong to a man in his cause, the Lord has no pleasure. | [WEB](WEB.md#v36) · [KJV](KJV.md#v36) · [ASV](ASV.md#v36) |
| [37](BBE.md#v37) | Who is able to say a thing, and give effect to it, if it has not been ordered by the Lord? | [WEB](WEB.md#v37) · [KJV](KJV.md#v37) · [ASV](ASV.md#v37) |
| [38](BBE.md#v38) | Do not evil and good come from the mouth of the Most High? | [WEB](WEB.md#v38) · [KJV](KJV.md#v38) · [ASV](ASV.md#v38) |
| [39](BBE.md#v39) | What protest may a living man make, even a man about the punishment of his sin? | [WEB](WEB.md#v39) · [KJV](KJV.md#v39) · [ASV](ASV.md#v39) |
| [40](BBE.md#v40) | Let us make search and put our ways to the test, turning again to the Lord; | [WEB](WEB.md#v40) · [KJV](KJV.md#v40) · [ASV](ASV.md#v40) |
| [41](BBE.md#v41) | Lifting up our hearts with our hands to God in the heavens. | [WEB](WEB.md#v41) · [KJV](KJV.md#v41) · [ASV](ASV.md#v41) |
| [42](BBE.md#v42) | We have done wrong and gone against your law; we have not had your forgiveness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v42) · [KJV](KJV.md#v42) · [ASV](ASV.md#v42) |
| [43](BBE.md#v43) | Covering yourself with wrath you have gone after us, cutting us off without pity; | [WEB](WEB.md#v43) · [KJV](KJV.md#v43) · [ASV](ASV.md#v43) |
| [44](BBE.md#v44) | Covering yourself with a cloud, so that prayer may not get through. | [WEB](WEB.md#v44) · [KJV](KJV.md#v44) · [ASV](ASV.md#v44) |
| [45](BBE.md#v45) | You have made us like waste and that for which there is no use, among the peoples. | [WEB](WEB.md#v45) · [KJV](KJV.md#v45) · [ASV](ASV.md#v45) |
| [46](BBE.md#v46) | The mouths of all our haters are open wide against us. | [WEB](WEB.md#v46) · [KJV](KJV.md#v46) · [ASV](ASV.md#v46) |
| [47](BBE.md#v47) | Fear and deep waters have come on us, wasting and destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v47) · [KJV](KJV.md#v47) · [ASV](ASV.md#v47) |
| [48](BBE.md#v48) | Rivers of water are running down from my eyes, for the destruction of the daughter of my people. | [WEB](WEB.md#v48) · [KJV](KJV.md#v48) · [ASV](ASV.md#v48) |
| [49](BBE.md#v49) | My eyes are streaming without stopping, they have no rest, | [WEB](WEB.md#v49) · [KJV](KJV.md#v49) · [ASV](ASV.md#v49) |
| [50](BBE.md#v50) | Till the Lord's eye is turned on me, till he sees my trouble from heaven. | [WEB](WEB.md#v50) · [KJV](KJV.md#v50) · [ASV](ASV.md#v50) |
| [51](BBE.md#v51) | The Lord is unkind to my soul, more than all the daughters of my town. | [WEB](WEB.md#v51) · [KJV](KJV.md#v51) · [ASV](ASV.md#v51) |
| [52](BBE.md#v52) | They who are against me without cause have gone hard after me as if I was a bird; | [WEB](WEB.md#v52) · [KJV](KJV.md#v52) · [ASV](ASV.md#v52) |
| [53](BBE.md#v53) | They have put an end to my life in the prison, stoning me with stones. | [WEB](WEB.md#v53) · [KJV](KJV.md#v53) · [ASV](ASV.md#v53) |
| [54](BBE.md#v54) | Waters were flowing over my head; I said, I am cut off. | [WEB](WEB.md#v54) · [KJV](KJV.md#v54) · [ASV](ASV.md#v54) |
| [55](BBE.md#v55) | I was making prayer to your name, O Lord, out of the lowest prison. | [WEB](WEB.md#v55) · [KJV](KJV.md#v55) · [ASV](ASV.md#v55) |
| [56](BBE.md#v56) | My voice came to you; let not your ear be shut to my breathing, to my cry. | [WEB](WEB.md#v56) · [KJV](KJV.md#v56) · [ASV](ASV.md#v56) |
| [57](BBE.md#v57) | You came near in the day when I made my prayer to you: you said, Have no fear. | [WEB](WEB.md#v57) · [KJV](KJV.md#v57) · [ASV](ASV.md#v57) |
| [58](BBE.md#v58) | O Lord, you have taken up the cause of my soul, you have made my life safe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v58) · [KJV](KJV.md#v58) · [ASV](ASV.md#v58) |
| [59](BBE.md#v59) | O Lord, you have seen my wrong; be judge in my cause. | [WEB](WEB.md#v59) · [KJV](KJV.md#v59) · [ASV](ASV.md#v59) |
| [60](BBE.md#v60) | You have seen all the evil rewards they have sent on me, and all their designs against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v60) · [KJV](KJV.md#v60) · [ASV](ASV.md#v60) |
| [61](BBE.md#v61) | Their bitter words have come to your ears, O Lord, and all their designs against me; | [WEB](WEB.md#v61) · [KJV](KJV.md#v61) · [ASV](ASV.md#v61) |
| [62](BBE.md#v62) | The lips of those who came up against me, and their thoughts against me all the day. | [WEB](WEB.md#v62) · [KJV](KJV.md#v62) · [ASV](ASV.md#v62) |
| [63](BBE.md#v63) | Take note of them when they are seated, and when they get up; I am their song. | [WEB](WEB.md#v63) · [KJV](KJV.md#v63) · [ASV](ASV.md#v63) |
| [64](BBE.md#v64) | You will give them their reward, O Lord, answering to the work of their hands. | [WEB](WEB.md#v64) · [KJV](KJV.md#v64) · [ASV](ASV.md#v64) |
| [65](BBE.md#v65) | You will let their hearts be covered over with your curse on them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v65) · [KJV](KJV.md#v65) · [ASV](ASV.md#v65) |
| [66](BBE.md#v66) | You will go after them in wrath, and put an end to them from under the heavens of the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v66) · [KJV](KJV.md#v66) · [ASV](ASV.md#v66) |
